definition.name: eps-JB-algebra
definition.definition: eps-JB algebra (order-unit form): finite-dim real order-unit space (A,1,<=) with order-unit norm, commutative bilinear product o with commutativity a o b=b o a and unit law 1 o a=a EXACT, and (JB1) ||a o b||<=(1+eps)||a||||b||, (JB2) ||a o a||>=(1-eps)||a||^2, (JB3) a o a>=-eps||a||^2 1, (JB4) approx Jordan identity. def-eps-jb-algebra.
